column2: # This whole document is only here to initialize everything. It contains the settings
# for the manuscript, but nothing else.
# Set chunk options (i.e., how chunks will be handled globally, can  however be overwritten locally in chunks)
echo=FALSE,     # chunks will not be printed in rendered document
include=FALSE,  # results will not be printed in the rendered document
message=FALSE,  # warnings and messages will no be shown in the rendered document
